name: chanter-operator
description: Local-first founder cockpit for reviewable operator workflows.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,magenta "npm run dev --workspace @chanter/operator-backend" "npm run dev --workspace @chanter/operator-frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @chanter/operator-backend && npm run build --workspace @chanter/operator-frontend
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @chanter/operator-backend && npm run test --workspace @chanter/operator-frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @chanter/operator-backend && npm run typecheck --workspace @chanter/operator-frontend
